title: Casparia confusa
taxonomy: Casparia confusa is classified in the family Rubiaceae. This classification places it within the order Gentianales. The family Rubiaceae includes approximately 13,000 species of flowering plants. The order Gentianales comprises several families, including Rubiaceae, Apocynaceae, and Loganiaceae. This classification helps to group Casparia confusa with other plants that share similar characteristics.
